source_discovery_method: fetch public board HTML and parse validated cards/links only
list_fetch_method: bounded HTML list fetch through source runner
detail_fetch_method: detail page required when list cards omit location/date/remote; use only fixture-backed extractors
pagination_method: only follow known next-page/list links with max-page and max-row limits
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: pending-research: Prefer raw id; otherwise stable URL id.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: pending-research: Vendor-specific payload shape needs saved fixture proof.
country_region_city_rule: pending-research: Vendor-specific payload shape needs saved fixture proof.
remote_type_rule: pending-research: Use explicit remote/workplace fields or conservative text only.
posting_date_rule: pending-research: Use source date only; leave null when source omits it.
rate_limit: strict host serialization, jitter, retry cap, and high block-rate stop

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: source canary only; public writes require raw parser fixture, expected normalized fixture, and passing parser tests

runner_interface.discover: fetch public board HTML and parse validated cards/links only
runner_interface.fetchList: bounded HTML list fetch through source runner
runner_interface.fetchDetail: detail page required when list cards omit location/date/remote; use only fixture-backed extractors
runner_interface.normalize: server/ingestion/parserContract.js normalized posting shape plus source-specific normalizer
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: add saved raw response fixture, expected normalized fixture, invalid-shape rejection test
certification_blockers: missing strict raw parser fixture; high missing normalized geo; source id reliability unproven/weak; canonical URL reliability unproven
